# registerGetACoffeeTool()

> **Tool Layer**

```ts
function registerGetACoffeeTool(server: McpServer, controller: GetACoffeeControllerClass): void;
```

Defined in: [coffee/get-a-coffee/tool/get-a-coffee.tool.ts:23](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/4112cd2ee9b9b05525039f4b7b060594d2aa7744/src/app/coffee/get-a-coffee/tool/get-a-coffee.tool.ts#L23)

Registers the `get-a-coffee` MCP tool on the server.

## Parameters

| Parameter    | Type                                                                                                               | Description                                   |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------- |
| `server`     | `McpServer`                                                                                                        | The MCP server to register the tool on.       |
| `controller` | [`GetACoffeeControllerClass`](../../../controller/get-a-coffee.controller/interfaces/GetACoffeeControllerClass.md) | The controller that handles tool invocations. |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Registers a tool named `"get-a-coffee"` that retrieves data for a specific
coffee by name. Uses [GetACoffeeInputSchema](../../../dto/get-a-coffee.dto/variables/GetACoffeeInputSchema.md) for input validation.

## See

[GetACoffeeControllerClass](../../../controller/get-a-coffee.controller/interfaces/GetACoffeeControllerClass.md) for the handler contract.
